name: update_zone_schedule_time_blocks
description: Updates the time blocks for a specific day in a heating schedule for a zone. Allows users to modify the heating schedule by setting custom time blocks with specific start/end times, temperature setpoints, and heating power mode (ON/OFF) for individual days of the week. This enables granular control over daily heating schedules.

day_of_week.description: The day of the week to update the time blocks for

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home

time_blocks.description: Array of time blocks defining the schedule for the specified day

dayType.description: The day type this block applies to

end.description: End time of the block in HH:MM format (24-hour)

geolocationOverride.description: Whether geolocation control is enabled for this block

setting.description: Heating setting for this time block

power.description: Whether heating is ON or OFF for this block

temperature.description: Temperature setting object (required when power is ON)

start.description: Start time of the block in HH:MM format (24-hour)

timetable_id.description: The unique identifier of the heating schedule timetable (e.g., '1' for ONE_DAY, '2' for SEVEN_DAY)

zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the heating zone/room
